title: Malty Creamy Italian Savoy Cabbage Saltimbocca
description: A malty and creamy Italian dish featuring Savoy cabbage, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. This dish is a twist on the classic saltimbocca, with caramelized flavors.
instructions: In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped Savoy cabbage and cook until wilted, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt syrup, heavy cream, turmeric, black pepper, and salt.
Pour the malt syrup mixture over the cabbage mixture and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the shaved grana padano cheese until melted and creamy.
Serve the malty creamy Italian Savoy cabbage saltimbocca hot, garnished with additional grated cheese if desired.
